_description: Prompt for Veo 3.1 or Kling to interpolate between Frame A and Frame B. Produces the actual video clip.
_usage: Feed Frame A image + Frame B image + this prompt to Veo/Kling.
interpolation_prompt:
Interpolate between Frame A (start) and Frame B (end) to create a smooth [FILL: 2-3] second video clip.

MOTION RULES:
- Camera is STATIC (locked selfie position, zero camera movement)
- All motion comes from the SUBJECT only
- Subtle natural motion: micro-expressions, small head movements, breathing, hair settling
- No sudden jumps or unnatural acceleration
- Consistent lighting throughout (no flicker)
- Consistent deep DOF (sharp background throughout)

WHAT MOVES:
- Facial muscles transitioning from A expression to B expression
- Head position shifting from A to B
- Eyes: pupil position, lid openness, blink if natural
- Mouth: lip position, jaw movement
- Breathing: subtle chest/shoulder rise and fall
- Hair: strands settling from head movement
- [FILL: specific motion per script, e.g. 'Body leaning forward toward camera']

WHAT DOESN'T MOVE:
- Camera position and angle
- Background elements
- Phone-holding hand grip
- Clothing
- Lighting direction and color
- Product in hand (same grip throughout)

AUDIO:
[FILL: environment-specific audio from V3 cues]

OUTPUT: [FILL: duration] seconds, input resolution, 24-30fps

environment_audio_presets.kitchen_morning: Quiet kitchen ambience: fridge hum, distant traffic through window, soft fabric rustle from movement. No music. No voiceover for hook clip
environment_audio_presets.bathroom: Bathroom echo on any sounds. Fan hum. Slight tile reverb. Water drip possible
environment_audio_presets.bedroom: Quiet. Soft fabric sounds. Maybe distant TV or music from another room. Muffled
environment_audio_presets.living_room: Living room ambient. TV low in background possible. More spacious reverb than bathroom
environment_audio_presets.car: Car cabin: engine idle or low road noise. Muffled exterior. Climate control fan. Enclosed acoustic
environment_audio_presets.outdoor: Environmental audio: wind, birds, traffic depending on setting. Open acoustic. No reverb
